# Contributing Guidelines

Contributions are welcome! Please follow the standard fork → new branch → changes → pull request workflow.

## Before you start

- Open an issue for feature requests or bugs before working on them to avoid duplicate effort.
- Make sure you understand what you're committing — you should be able to explain it in plain English without resorting to AI.

## Code standards

- Use comments where necessary (don't state the obvious, explain the *why*).
- Name everything thoughtfully — commits (`fix: window behaviour change for MangoWM`), variables, files, directories, etc.
- Keep it clean and consistent with the existing style.

## Communication

- Keep arguments professional. Stick to the problem, not the person.
- No swearing. Disagree respectfully.

## Pull requests

- Reference any related issues in the PR description.
- Ensure your changes work on a fresh clone + stow before submitting.

## License

By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the same license as this project (see [LICENSE](./LICENSE)).
